blocks.content: In this milestone, you open the settings panel for a namespace where you have instrumented services. From here, you can enable ongoing instrumentation and adjust other telemetry options.
In the **Manage** tab, find a namespace that has instrumented services.
Click the **gear icon** (⚙️) in the namespace row to open settings.

Review the current settings for the namespace. You should see toggles for:

- Ongoing Instrumentation
- Application Logs
- Process Metrics
- Traces
- Profiling
- Extended Application Metrics
> **Note:** Both the gear icon and clicking the namespace name followed by **Settings** open the same settings panel. Use whichever is more convenient.
In the next milestone, you'll enable ongoing instrumentation.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Application namespace settings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#application-namespace-settings)
- [Manage instrumentation and settings](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#manage-instrumentation-and-settings)
